title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
summary: Google has released Veo 3.1 Lite, their most cost-effective video generation model, available via the Gemini API and Google AI Studio.
why_included: This is a new, cost-effective video generation model from Google, expanding their offerings in the multimodal AI space.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
summary: Google has launched Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, an update aimed at making audio AI more natural and reliable across its products.
why_included: This is an update to Google's Gemini family, focusing on improving the quality and reliability of its audio AI capabilities.
